news.summary: MILL VALLEY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)—Four Corners Property Trust, a real estate investment trust focused on owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has recently acquired three Express Oil Change & Tire Engineers properties for a total of $9.5 million. These properties are strategically positioned in busy areas in Georgia and are operated by the corporation under extended triple net leases.
news.headline: FCPT buys 3 Express Oil Change properties for $9.5 million in Georgia, adding to its portfolio.
Keros emphasizes dedication to enhancing shareholder value.

news.summary: Montreal, May 08, 2025 - Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd (the “Corporation” or “Osisko”) (OR: TSX & NYSE) has successfully changed its name to "OR Royalties Inc." and "Redevances OR Inc." in French. This change was approved by shareholders at the annual and special meeting held today.
news.headline: Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd changed its name to "OR Royalties Inc." after shareholder approval at annual meeting.

news.summary: Firm Capital Property Trust (FCPT) recently finalized the sale of a 100% stake in a Montreal Industrial Portfolio Joint Venture property, consisting of a 159,470 square foot industrial facility. The transaction brought in about $27.9 million in gross proceeds, with net earnings totaling $27.5 million after closing costs. FCPT is set to receive about $13.8 million from the gross proceeds, post-closing costs.
news.headline: Firm Capital Property Trust sells 50% interest in Montreal industrial building for $27.9M, nets $13.8M after costs.

news.summary: On March 18, 2025, Guardian Capital LP corrected its distribution announcement for the Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund (TSX: GUTB.U) made on March 17, 2025. The initial report incorrectly stated the distribution in Canadian dollars, but the fund's units are in U.S. dollars. The accurate distribution is USD$0.1725 per ETF unit. Key dates for the distribution, including the ex-dividend date, record date, and payment date, are unchanged.
news.headline: Guardian Capital corrects cash distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund to USD $0.1725 per unit. Dates remain unchanged.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. (TSXV: MNC; MNC.PR.A) based in Calgary, Alberta and Toronto reported its failure to meet the April 30 deadline for submitting important annual disclosure documents referred to as the “Annual Filings."
news.headline: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. delays Annual Financial Statements filing past April 30; seeks Management Cease Trade Order.

news.summary: This financing deal signifies the largest ever receivable financing for a Municipal Utility District.
news.headline: Texas infrastructure program secures $196 million in revenue anticipation bonds for Starwood Land, largest MUD financing.

news.summary: Roquette's performance in 2024 showcased the sturdy nature of its integrated business model, with its Pharmaceutical Activities driving growth. The company reported significant progress, as indicated by its financial results and operational data. This success can be largely attributed to the resilience of Roquette's diverse business approach, emphasizing its capability to navigate challenges and capitalize on opportunities within the market.
news.headline: Roquette's 2024 results show resilience in business with focus on pharmaceutical activities.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Guelph, Ontario, Hammond Power Solutions Inc. ("HPS") (TSX: HPS.A) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting as mandated by the Toronto Stock Exchange rules. HPS, a prominent producer of dry-type transformers and power quality items, unveiled the voting statistics from the gathering held on the specified date at their Ontario headquarters.
news.headline: Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (TSX: HPS.A) reveals voting outcomes from its Annual General Meeting in Ontario.

news.summary: Two hundred fifty new cases of COVID-19 were reported today, bringing the total number of cases in the country to over 15,000. Additionally, authorities announced that three more people have died from the virus, raising the death toll to 320. The government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings.Officials are urging the public to follow guidelines to prevent further transmission of the virus.
news.headline: Pieridae unveils voting outcomes and name change to Cavvy Energy Ltd at annual meeting.

news.summary: Today, in Toronto, AGF Investments Inc. (AGF Investments) revealed an updated final distribution figure for AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF, with the ticker symbol QGB. The ETF is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol AGF.B.
news.headline: AGF Investments revises final distribution for AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF (ticker: QGB) in Toronto.

news.summary: LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) disclosed today that its subsidiary, LYB International Finance III, LLC, has set the price for a public offering of $500,000,000 in total principal of 6.150% Guaranteed Notes maturing in 2035. These Notes will benefit from full and unconditional backing from LyondellBasell. The completion of this Offering is projected for May 15, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
news.headline: LyondellBasell prices $500 million public offering of 6.150% Guaranteed Notes due 2035, closing on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 150,000, with 10,000 new cases being recorded in the last 24 hours alone. Additionally, the death toll has now risen to 2,000, with 150 new fatalities reported. These alarming figures highlight the ongoing severity of the pandemic and the urgent need for continued vigilance and preventative measures to curb the spread of the virus. The government has reiterated the importance of practicing social distancing, wearing masks, and following hygiene protocols to protect public health and safety. Stay informed and stay safe.
news.headline: Brunswick Exploration launches C$2.5M private placement, backed by a key investor.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.21 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be distributed on June 13, 2025, to shareholders of record as of that date.
news.headline: Weyerhaeuser announces $0.21/share dividend, completes $500M repurchase program, starts $1B program.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) has appointed Thomas J. Gorman as the non-executive Chairman of the Board, starting from May 8, 2025. This decision was made following the Company’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Gorman, who has been an independent director since May 2021, takes over from Steven W. Williams. Williams recently resigned from the Board.
news.headline: Alcoa Corporation appoints Thomas J. Gorman as Board Chairman, effective May 8, 2025, succeeding Steven W. Williams.

news.summary: In Denver, BKV Corporation (NYSE: BKV) revealed the establishment of a strategic joint venture between its subsidiary, BKV dCarbon Ventures, LLC, and Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP). This collaboration aims to bolster BKV's carbon capture, utilization, and sequestration (CCUS) project portfolio. CIP, representing its Energy Transition Fund I, has pledged an investment of $500 million towards this venture.
news.headline: BKV and Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners form $500 million joint venture for carbon capture projects.

news.summary: A prominent organization in Southern California, OneLegacy, specializing in organ, eye, and tissue recovery, has recently inaugurated two regional offices in Mission Hills and Orange County. This strategic move is part of their dedication to advancing the cause of organ, eye, and tissue donation to save and improve lives. By setting up these offices, OneLegacy seeks to broaden its reach and educational efforts in the area. Serving seven counties in the region, the organization is striving towards increasing its impact further with these new offices.
news.headline: OneLegacy opens new offices in Mission Hills and Orange County to enhance organ, eye, and tissue donation efforts.

news.summary: Maxim Power Corp. (TSX: MXG) released its financial and operating results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, based in Calgary, Alberta. The unaudited condensed consolidated interim financial statements, along with accompanying notes and Management’s Discussion and Analysis (“MD&A”), will be accessible on SEDAR+ and the company's website on May 8, 2025. All figures mentioned are in Canadian dollars.
news.headline: Maxim Power Corp. releases Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. Available on SEDAR and website.

news.summary: Analyst John Mazzoni of Seaport Research Partners has given a Buy rating to major waste management companies, citing their resilient business models, recurring revenue, and barriers to entry in the Environmental Services sector. Historically, these companies outperformed the S&P 500 by an average of 10% in the past 16 market corrections, with a success rate of around 75%. GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) was initiated with a price forecast of $58 by Mazzoni, who highlighted the company's leadership under Founder and CEO Patrick Dovigi as a strength, offering potential long-term continuity and growth advantages. Founder-led companies are perceived to perform better than non-founder-led firms. GFL announced plans to sell a stake in their Environmental Services business for debt reduction and stock buyback. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analyst recommends waste management stocks, outperforming S&P500 by 10% in market corrections. GFL price target $58.
Trump announces a UK trade agreement with no concrete details mentioned报道。

news.summary: AvionTEq, a top supplier of avionics test equipment and flight data solutions, recently concluded its involvement at MRO Americas 2025 in Atlanta, Georgia. Their booth at the event attracted significant attention, showcasing cutting-edge tools and services catering to current aviation requirements. A standout feature was the UTS100 Raffle, with Jonathan Carter from Delta Air Lines, Inc. revealed as the lucky winner of the ULBTEq UTS100 Ultrasonic ULB Tes.
news.headline: AvionTEq celebrates MRO Americas 2025 success, prepares for upcoming events. Raffle winner announced: Jonathan Carter.
LG ENERGY ACQUIRES GM'S MICHIGAN EV BATTERY PLANT FOR $2B – NIKKEI

news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has recently launched a detailed guide for IT leaders in higher education, concentrating on updating enterprise resource planning. This blueprint emphasizes the importance of aligning technology strategies with institutional objectives. It offers valuable insights to IT leaders in the sector, aiming to assist them in the modernization process.
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group provides higher ed IT leaders a resource for ERP modernization focusing on aligning tech with goals.

news.summary: For a limited time, Chris Auffenberg Ford in Washington, Missouri is providing local drivers in Washington, MO, and nearby areas with an opportunity to purchase a new Ford vehicle at the same discounted price that Ford employees receive. This special Ford Employee Pricing event allows customers to access exclusive pricing typically reserved for employees. This promotion is currently active at Chris Auffenberg Ford and offers significant savings on new Ford vehicles.
news.headline: Chris Auffenberg Ford in Washington, MO, offers limited-time Ford Employee Pricing on new vehicles.

news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois on May 8, 2025, Cyclopure, Inc. introduced Purefast® HomeXtreme as part of their residential filter product line, catering to PFAS removal from household water. This new filter model has a high capacity of 160,000 gallons and comes loaded with DEXSORB® technology. Priced at $1,200, the Purefast® HomeXtreme is designed to operate efficiently for an extended period.
news.headline: Cyclopure launches Purefast® HomeXtreme filter for PFAS removal, $1,200, 160,000-gallon capacity.

news.summary: In Rochelle Park, New Jersey, on May 8, 2025, Intelligent Audit revealed that CEO Hannah Testani has been recognized as the most influential business leader to watch in 2025 by The Enterprise World. This acknowledgment highlights her impactful leadership within the industry and the notable achievements of Intelligent Audit.
news.headline: Hannah Testani, CEO of Intelligent Audit, named 'Most Influential Business Leader to Watch in 2025' by The Enterprise World.

news.summary: Ripple, a fintech company, has reached a settlement with the SEC to pay $50 million in order to resolve a lawsuit concerning the sales of XRP. This agreement concludes a lengthy legal battle between the two parties.
news.headline: Ripple settles XRP lawsuit with SEC for $50M after a long legal battle.

news.summary: Beth Finkel, Director of AARP in New York State, commended the New York State Legislature for allocating $53 million towards unmet needs in aging services in the upcoming 2025-26 fiscal year budget. This significant commitment was announced on May 8, 2025, and marks a crucial investment in addressing the needs of the elderly population in the state. AARP praised this move as a positive step towards providing essential support for aging services.
news.headline: New York State allocates $53M to reduce aging services waitlists, praised by AARP NY as life-changing.

news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) reported its U.S. GAAP consolidated unaudited earnings per share (EPS) for the three months ending on March 31. The numbers for 2025 compared to 2024 are as follows: GAAP EPS 2025 - Utilities and Corporate Services $0.87 ($0.62 in 2024), American Transmission Company (ATC) Holdings $0.04 ($0.04 in 2024), Non-utility and Parent ($0.08) ($0.04 in 2024), and Alliant Energy Consolidated $0.83 ($0.62 in 2024). The company expressed satisfaction with its strong performance at the beginning of 2025.
news.headline: Alliant Energy 1Q 2025 results: GAAP EPS $0.83, up from $0.62 in 2024, reflecting solid performance.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, falling to 4.2% in the current quarter. This marks a significant improvement from the previous quarter when the rate was at 5.1%. The report also indicates that the economy added 300,000 new jobs in various sectors, with the service industry showing the highest growth at 8%. Additionally, the report highlights a notable increase in wages by 5% on average across all industries. Experts attribute this positive trend to government policies aimed at boosting job creation and economic growth.
news.headline: Biotech firm Turnstone Biologics Corp. releases Q1 2025 financials and key updates in latest report.

news.summary: Ziff Davis, Inc. announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ZD, also reaffirmed its guidance for the year 2025.
news.headline: Ziff Davis (NASDAQ: ZD) reports Q1 2025 financial results, reaffirms 2025 guidance.

news.summary: The focus on longevity has become a significant interest in both science and society, yet discussions often become mired in intricate research or unrealistic ideas associated with Silicon Valley. This unique podcast aims to change that narrative by convening leading experts in the field of healthspan. Their goal is to delve into tangible realities, highlight crucial aspects, and explore future trajectories—shifting the conversation from abstract concepts to practical applications.
news.headline: Global Wellness Institute introduces podcast "The Wellness Roundtable: Longevity" on May 14, focusing on healthspan with experts.

news.summary: Centrus Energy Corp. (NYSE American: LEU) based in Bethesda, Maryland revealed that its management is set to engage in upcoming conferences. On May 12, executives will meet with investors at the company's headquarters. This event is part of the strategic plan and aims to enhance investor relations. The company seeks to bolster its presence by providing insights on its operations and objectives. The involvement in these conferences displays the willingness of Centrus Energy Corp. to communicate effectively, with the goal of fostering transparent and productive relationships with stakeholders.
news.headline: Centrus Energy (NYSE: LEU) to host investors on May 12 at Bethesda HQ, as part of upcoming conferences.

news.summary: In New Haven, Connecticut on May 8, 2025, Knights of Columbus Supreme Knight Patrick Kelly released a statement in response to the election of Pope Leo XIV. Kelly expressed the organization's joy in the new Pope's election, emphasizing unity with Catholics worldwide. His Holiness Pope Leo XIV is the chosen pontiff, ushering in a new era for the global Catholic community. This announcement signifies a significant event in the Catholic Church's history, and the Knights of Columbus stand in solidarity with the faithful during this time.
news.headline: Knights of Columbus Supreme Knight Patrick Kelly celebrates the election of Pope Leo XIV.

news.summary: Cloudflare's stock experienced an increase following the announcement of Q1 earnings that were in line with analysts' expectations. The company generated revenue that exceeded estimates, and its revenue guidance for the future also aligned with market forecasts. This positive performance led to a rise in the stock price.
news.headline: Cloudflare's Q1 earnings met expectations, revenue exceeded estimates, stock rose.

news.summary: A resident of Bozeman, Montana, Lindy Hockenbary has been recognized as one of the 2025 Leading Women in AI by ASU+GSV. As a part of LindyHoc, she has launched a new K-12 educational technology brand along with an AI educator toolkit. These tools are aimed at enhancing the learning experience in schools through the use of artificial intelligence.
news.headline: LindyHoc founder Lindy Hockenbary named a 2025 Leading Woman in AI by ASU+GSV, launches new EdTech brand; unveils K-12 AI educator toolkit.

news.summary: Late on Thursday, Pinterest saw a surge in its stock following the release of its first quarter results, which were a mix of positive and negative. Despite concerns about tariffs, the company provided a promising outlook for sales that exceeded expectations. This news was well-received by investors, leading to a significant increase in Pinterest's stock value.
news.headline: Pinterest stock rises sharply after reporting mixed Q1 results, with a stronger-than-expected sales outlook despite tariff concerns.

news.summary: Meta, formerly known as Facebook, is looking to incorporate stablecoin payments into its platforms after a three-year break from cryptocurrencies. The tech company may adopt a multi-token approach and integrate popular stablecoins like Tether's USDT and Circle's USDC. The stablecoin market capitalization has surpassed $230 billion due to growing institutional interest. Payment processing companies like Visa and Stripe have made investments in stablecoin startups and introduced stablecoin integrations. World Liberty Financial, backed by former US President Donald Trump, launched USD1, a US dollar-pegged stablecoin, which quickly became the seventh-largest stablecoin by market cap. Stablecoin regulations were put on hold as Democratic Senators blocked the GENIUS Stablecoin bill, causing disappointment among Trump administration officials. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent emphasized the importance of stablecoins in extending US dollar hegemony.
news.headline: Meta considers stablecoin payouts, may integrate popular stablecoins like USDT, USDC. Stablecoin market cap exceeds $230B, attracting institutional interest. Visa, Stripe, WLFI invested in stablecoin startups, highlighting rapid growth. Democratic Senators blocked GENIUS Stablecoin bill, hindering US dollar dominance push.

news.summary: CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ: CLSK) recently released its first-quarter financial results, revealing a revenue of $181.71 million, falling below the expected $190.95 million. The company reported a loss of 49 cents per share, contrasting with the estimated loss of eight cents per share. The news was shared shortly after the market closed on Thursday. For more detailed information, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CleanSpark misses Q1 earnings estimates with revenue at $181.71M, shares slide. Company aiming for 50 EH/s target in June.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on May 08, 2025, Canacol Energy Ltd. ("Canacol" or "the Corporation") (TSX:CNE; OTCQX:CNNEF; BVC:CNEC) announced its financial and operational performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The figures are presented in United States dollars, except for Canadian dollar unit prices (C$) as specified.
news.headline: Canacol Energy Ltd. sees 12% rise in gas netback in Q1 2025, reports financial results for March 31, 2025.

news.summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--i3 Verticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IIIV) shared their financial performance for the fiscal second quarter ending March 31, 2025. Noteworthy figures from ongoing operations for the three and six months concluding on March 31, 2025 compared to 2024 indicate second quarter revenue reaching $63.1 million, marking an 8.8% rise from the previous year. Moreover, the revenue for the six-month period ending March 31, 2025, amounted to $124.8 million, reflecting a 10.4% surge from the same period in the prior year.
news.headline: i3 Verticals reports Q2 2025 revenue of $63.1M, up 8.8% from last year. Six-month revenue at $124.8M, rose by 10.4%.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate declined to 4.2%. This is the lowest it has been in five years, translating to approximately 8.4 million people who are currently unemployed. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs last month, across various sectors such as retail, healthcare, and technology. The median household income also saw growth, reaching $65,000 annually. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the country's economic recovery post-pandemic.
news.headline: Atlanticus announces Q1 2025 financial figures.

news.summary: Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) disclosed today in Toronto that at the 2025 Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders, following shareholder approval, the company's upcoming actions were solidified.
news.headline: Allied Gold consolidates shares in preparation to list on NYSE post approval at 2025 meeting.

news.summary: In Munich on May 8, 2025, Envision Energy, a prominent player in green technology, unveiled its 2025 Net Zero Action Report at the Smarter E Europe event. The report highlights the company's dedication to climate leadership. Envision Energy marked a significant milestone by attaining operational carbon neutrality for the third time.
news.headline: Envision Energy unveils 2025 Net Zero Report at Smarter E Europe, celebrates third year of carbon neutrality.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on May 8, 2025, Angel MedFlight Worldwide Air Ambulance has revealed that their CEO and President, Christine Aguilera, has been selected as a finalist for the respected Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 award.
news.headline: Angel MedFlight CEO Christine Aguilera is a finalist for Ernst & Young Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025, announced on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In Houston, Geospace has disclosed its second quarter fiscal year 2025 outcomes with a revenue of $18.0 million, amid which the company experienced a net loss of ($9.8) million, translating to $(0.77) per diluted share.
news.headline: Geospace Technologies Corp reports Q2FY25 revenue of $18.0 million, with a net loss of ($9.8) million.

news.summary: In Seattle on May 8, 2025, Alaska Air Group, Inc. revealed the appointment of Pete Shimer to their board of directors, succeeding Ken Thompson following his retirement after a quarter-century of service. Shimer, who initially joined as an auditor, has served in various C-suite roles throughout his career.
news.headline: Alaska Air Group appoints Pete Shimer to board, replacing Ken Thompson after 25 years of service.

news.summary: LEQVIO represents a major breakthrough in managing hypercholesterolemia, especially for patients who have not reached their target LDL-C levels despite being on the highest tolerated statin therapy. Serving as the initial FDA-endorsed siRNA treatment for reducing LDL-C levels, it brings forth a new mechanism of action.
news.headline: LEQVIO leads in cholesterol-lowering therapies in 7 markets. First FDA-approved siRNA therapy for LDL-C reduction.

news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global leader in automotive safety systems, disclosed the outcomes of its yearly general stockholders' gathering on May 8, 2025. The meeting discussed the company's performance in the determined period. Autoliv, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALV and on the SSE as ALIV.sdb.
news.headline: Autoliv reports results of 2025 annual stockholders meeting on May 8. Leader in safety systems, stockholders' meeting held.

news.summary: A legal action has been filed against Brookfield Asset Management alleging fraudulent activities, attempted bribery, and unjustly restricting investment opportunities in a company associated with Elon Musk. The lawsuit highlights serious claims against the company concerning financial misconduct and interference in investment activities. This legal dispute raises significant concerns and underscores the complexities surrounding the operations of Brookfield Asset Management in relation to Elon Musk's ventures. The case brings to light potential illicit practices and controversial actions that may have impacted the investment landscape.
news.headline: Investor linked to Musk battles asset manager over fraud and bribery allegations, limiting investments.
